summary.name: NETRA Evidence Lab
summary.flow: Upload Evidence -> Zia Extraction -> QuickML RAG -> Crime DNA Match -> SmartBrowz Report -> Signals Audit
summary.disclaimer: Synthetic evidence simulation only. No real PII, biometric identity, or enforcement decision is generated.

evidenceProfiles.label: FIR PDF Intake
evidenceProfiles.sourceText: OCR extracted duplicate-key motorcycle theft near Mysuru railway parking, repeated phone hash PH-HASH-MYS-909, vehicle KA-09-MX-4481, evening pattern between 8 PM and 11 PM.

evidenceProfiles.label: CCTV Image
evidenceProfiles.sourceText: CCTV frame shows two-person motorcycle theft pattern near Jayanagar metro exit, handle lock break, KA-05-SYN-1122 plate candidate, shared phone hash PH-HASH-711.

evidenceProfiles.label: ID / Document Scan
evidenceProfiles.sourceText: Document scanner extracted masked account support script, repeated bank impersonation wording, PH-HASH-450, and mule account pattern across Hubballi-Dharwad and Mangaluru.

evidenceProfiles.label: Audio Clip

extracted.location: market road and dim lane corridor

evidenceProfiles.sourceText: Speech-to-text transcript mentions rider-pillion scooter, gold chain snatching near market road, same KA-09-SYN-3001 scooter, evening escape through dim lane.

workflowEvents.name: Evidence uploaded
workflowEvents.detail: Object stored with metadata, hash, uploader role, and retention tag.

workflowEvents.name: Zia extraction completed
workflowEvents.detail: OCR, STT, object recognition, ID scanner, and text analytics normalize evidence entities.

workflowEvents.name: Entity event emitted
workflowEvents.detail: New vehicle, phone hash, station, and suspect mention trigger matching functions.

workflowEvents.name: Crime DNA and RAG fused
workflowEvents.detail: Evidence metadata retrieves FIR, legal, SOP, and graph sources; repeated matches are cached.

workflowEvents.name: Supervisor circuit opened
workflowEvents.detail: Human review branch must approve report circulation or request more validation.

workflowEvents.name: Report rendered and logged
workflowEvents.detail: Official HTML brief renders to PDF, stores in Stratus, sends notification, and writes audit log.

ragCorpus.title: FIR narrative and evidence metadata
ragCorpus.detail: Retrieves FIR summary, MO, station, time window, vehicle, phone hash, and linked entities.

ragCorpus.title: BNS / IPC legal support mapping
ragCorpus.detail: Maps crime category to advisory legal sections while preserving human legal review.

ragCorpus.title: Investigation SOP guardrails
ragCorpus.detail: Adds manual verification, source traceability, privacy masking, and supervisor review requirements.
